tools.Name: FastMCP
tools.Description: A fast, Pythonic framework for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and clients, handling schema generation, validation, and protocol lifecycle automatically.
tools.Use_Case: Developing AI applications that need to connect to external tools, data, or interactive UIs within the conversation context.

tools.Name: RAG-Anything
tools.Description: An all-in-one multimodal RAG framework that processes diverse documents including text, images, tables, and mathematical equations.
tools.Use_Case: Enterprise knowledge management and research where documents contain mixed-content types requiring a unified, multimodal processing framework.

tools.Name: Kimi Code CLI
tools.Description: An autonomous AI agent that runs in the terminal, capable of reading/editing code, executing shell commands, and autonomous planning.
tools.Use_Case: Software development tasks, terminal operations, and autonomous coding assistance through shell or IDE integration.
